{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Forged knives
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Forged knives]] are used to destroy constructs.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
